excerpt: In 1957 New Zealand, a shy young man struggles to juggle a burgeoning romance, his domineering mother, and a zombie outbreak.
title: Braindead

excerpt: A young girl steps through her mirror into a world of talking chess pieces, sobbing turtles, mad queens, and clumsy knights.
title: Alice in Wonderland

excerpt: After a cruel prank goes wrong, a comatose boarding school student possesses a new classmate to exact revenge on the perpetrators.
title: Aenigma

excerpt: Two teens realize a cursed television in their new home has released a group of zombies terrorizing their suburban neighborhood.
title: The Video Dead

excerpt: Inmates in a women’s prison endure hardship and humiliation at the hands of the wheelchair-bound, sexually-repressed warden and a doctor with a penchant for lobotomies and sexual assault.
title: Caged Heat
